recommended_sampling._comment: Four Qwen-official presets; use thinking_general as default for reasoning-capable use
recommended_sampling.notes: Default values are for thinking_general mode. Qwen publishes 4 presets (see nested objects). presence_penalty 0-2 reduces repetition; higher values may cause language-mixing. Small models (≤9B) have thinking DISABLED by default in standard deployments — enable via chat_template_kwargs enable_thinking:true. Qwen official model page shows thinking enabled by default; llama.cpp/LM Studio behavior may differ — verify per runtime.

recommended_context.yarn_notes: YaRN RoPE scaling supported. To extend beyond 262,144 tokens set rope_type=yarn, factor=4.0, original_max_position_embeddings=262144 in config. llama.cpp: --rope-scaling yarn --rope-scale 4.0 for extended context. 'Context: 256k (default)' confirmed in DavidAU card.

chat_template.notes: Uses Qwen3.5 ChatML variant. Thinking generates <think>...</think> blocks before response. Small sizes (≤9B) may have thinking OFF by default in some runtimes; pass enable_thinking:true to activate. llama.cpp: --chat-template-kwargs '{"enable_thinking":true}'. Multi-turn: exclude thinking content from history.

thinking.how: Generates <think>...</think> reasoning block before final answer. Enabled/disabled via chat_template_kwargs enable_thinking flag. No soft-switch (/think /no_think) unlike Qwen3.
thinking.recommended: Enable for reasoning/complex tasks; disable (enable_thinking:false) for fast instruct/chat use. For llama.cpp: --chat-template-kwargs '{"enable_thinking":true}'. Use thinking_general preset (temp=1.0, top_p=0.95, top_k=20, presence_penalty=1.5) when thinking is active. Do NOT use greedy decoding — causes degradation and repetition loops.

llama_cpp_notes: Recommended quant: Q4_K_M or better for vanilla GGUF; DavidAU minimum is Q4_KS (non-imatrix) or IQ3S (imatrix). Use --cache-type-k bf16 --cache-type-v bf16 if seeing gibberish. For thinking: --chat-template-kwargs '{"enable_thinking":true}'. For YaRN at extended context: --rope-scaling yarn --rope-scale 4.0. mradermacher GGUF repo is static quant of DavidAU source (HERETIC variant) and Jackrong/tvall43 source (Qwopus v3 heretic variant).

finetune_overrides.name: DavidAU/Qwen3.5-4B-Claude-4.6-OS-Auto-Variable-HERETIC-UNCENSORED-THINKING
finetune_overrides.description: DavidAU finetune of Qwen3.5-4B trained on Claude 4.6-OS dataset, uncensored via Heretic abliteration. 'Auto-Variable' refers to adaptive variable thinking integration via custom Jinja template.

davidau_specific.smoothing_note: Set smoothing_factor=1.5 in compatible UIs (KoboldCpp: Settings>Samplers>Advanced>Smooth_F; SillyTavern: Smoothing; text-gen-webui: Parameters lower right). Alternative: raise repetition_penalty to 1.1-1.15.
davidau_specific.repetition_penalty_range: 1.1 to 1.15 recommended as alternative to smoothing_factor

dry_sampler.note: DavidAU guide recommends DRY sampler for Class 3/4 models

finetune_overrides.notes: Sampling presets mirror base Qwen3.5 recommendations. DavidAU adds smoothing_factor=1.5 and rep_pen 1.1-1.15 as key differentiators. Verified from 9B sibling card — 4B card content appeared to repeat same parameters.

finetune_overrides.name: tvall43/Qwopus3.5-4B-v3-heretic
finetune_overrides.description: Qwopus3.5-4B is a Qwen3.5-4B finetune trained on curated reasoning chains (Claude/Opus-style). v3-heretic adds abliteration via Heretic v1.2.0, direction_index=16.93, KL divergence 0.0336 from base, refusal rate 4/100 (vs 100/100 original).
finetune_overrides.notes: No explicit sampler settings published in tvall43 or mradermacher model cards. Use base Qwen3.5 presets. Qwopus is NOT a DavidAU model — separate lineage (tvall43 author). Chain-of-thought via <think> tokens; response-only training masked on '<|im_start|>assistant\n<think>'. Thinking mode expected ON by default (trained for it). Context length increased vs v2 but exact max not stated in card — assume 262144 inherited from Qwen3.5-4B base.

sources.label: Qwen readthedocs quickstart (Qwen3 inference settings reference)

gaps: 1) DavidAU 4B card was not fetched directly (HF page returned same content as 9B sibling — likely same template); sampler params confirmed identical across DavidAU Qwen3.5 family. 2) Qwopus3.5-4B-v3-heretic has NO published sampler recommendations — using base Qwen3.5 presets as fallback. 3) Auto-Variable technical definition not documented beyond inferred 'adaptive thinking via custom Jinja'. 4) Qwen3.5-4B is officially multimodal (image-text-to-text per HF tags); vision inference params not researched. 5) Exact context max for Qwopus v3 not stated in card.
